assertion_results.text: Does not apply FINRA suitability as primary standard
assertion_results.evidence: Fiduciary/best-interest framing dominant or equal — suitability terms: 2 (suitability x2) vs fiduciary/best-interest terms: 21 (fiduciary x8, best interest x5, duty of loyalty x2, duty of care x4, section 206 x1, advisers act x1)
